headline: Tracking AMG's Yacktman Asset Management Portfolio - Q1 2026 Update
summary: Yacktman Asset Management's Q1 2026 13F portfolio rose to ~$7.5B, with 76 holdings and 11.5% cash, led by Canadian Natural Resources at 10.75%. View the full analysis here.
